target: Withstand design landing load of 3 g vertical at race mass
acceptance: Factor of safety ≥ 2.0 on yield; no permanent deformation

target: Structure protects head/torso if cart tips or rolls
acceptance: Driver's head inside structural envelope at full roll; meets RB roll requirement

target: Min 4-point harness, anchored to frame
acceptance: Anchors hold ≥ 5 g forward pull without failure

target: Self-extraction, no assistance, no tools
acceptance: Out in ≤ 10 s in full bottle costume + helmet

target: Certified helmet; gloves; closed shoes
acceptance: Present and compliant at scrutineering

target: Forward field of view around shell + costume
acceptance: ≥ 100° horizontal clear forward arc; cones visible at braking distance

target: "Ignition" is light only — no flame, smoke, fuel
acceptance: Zero combustion source; electrical only, fused

target: No exposed sharp edges, no loose costume snag points
acceptance: All edges radiused/capped; costume secured

target: Negotiate tightest course chicane at speed
acceptance: Turning radius ≤ 6 m; clears chicane without lifting a wheel

target: Minimal slop in the linkage
acceptance: Free play < 5° at the steering input

target: Toe stays stable over bumps/jump compression
acceptance: Toe change < 1° across suspension/flex travel

target: Steerable one-handed if needed
acceptance: Input effort comfortable for full run; no fade in control

target: Stable straight-line tracking
acceptance: Tracks straight hands-light on the flat-out section

target: Decelerate from top speed in a controlled distance
acceptance: Sustained decel ≥ 0.4 g; stop from 40 km/h ≤ 16 m

target: Within one person's strength
acceptance: Full braking at input force ≤ 200 N

target: Holds over a full run length
acceptance: < 15% decel loss from first to last brake on the run

target: No lock-induced spin
acceptance: No uncommanded yaw > 5° under hard braking

target: Brake remains usable if one side degrades
acceptance: Cart still stoppable with a single-circuit/half failure

target: Total race mass under official limit
acceptance: ≤ limit − 10% margin; confirmed on a scale

target: Per-subsystem mass logged vs. allowance
acceptance: Rolling total within budget; no subsystem > +15% over allowance

target: Mass added low and adjustable, not structural
acceptance: Ballast removable/tunable; mounted at floor only

target: Real mass matches CAD estimate
acceptance: Measured total within ±5% of CAD prediction

target: Low despite tall shell
acceptance: CoG height ≤ 0.45 × track width; measured by tilt-table

target: Won't tip in cornering or on ramp
acceptance: Static rollover threshold > 1.3 × max lateral g seen on course

target: Front/rear split good for steer + brake
acceptance: Weight distribution within 45–55% front, per handling target

target: Lands nose-slightly-up, not nose-first
acceptance: Predicted landing attitude within safe pitch band; verified on ramp

target: Driver, bottle, ballast at floor
acceptance: Combined occupant CoG at/below axle line

target: Stays planted, esp. on the jump
acceptance: Net lift ≤ 0 (neutral-to-slight-down) at top speed

target: Reduce drag without losing the heater shape
acceptance: Drag reduced vs. baseline box shell with no silhouette change that breaks recognisability

target: Predictable in side gusts
acceptance: Yaw moment in crosswind within controllable limit

target: No flip/lift tendency during jump
acceptance: Pitch/lift behaviour stable through the air on ramp test

target: Tools and materials inside ~R9,000
acceptance: Bill of materials + tools total ≤ R9,000; tracked monthly

target: No step needs >1 person or specialist machine
acceptance: Every operation doable with planned hand/portable tools

target: Cheap, locally sourced stock
acceptance: All materials available from common SA suppliers; no exotic stock

target: Buildable June–Aug 2026
acceptance: Build plan fits timeline with slack before event date

target: No suspension/hydraulics/fancy electronics
acceptance: Design uses only "modern, effective, nothing fancy" methods

target: Common failures fixable on the day
acceptance: Wheels, brakes, steering, glow serviceable with carried tools

target: Instantly recognisable as an LPG gas heater
acceptance: ≥ 90% of a cold-audience test names it "heater" unprompted

target: Driver-triggered, fires every run
acceptance: Glow ignites on trigger in 3/3 rehearsal runs; no missed bar

target: Glow + bottle read at distance
acceptance: Panels clearly visible at ≥ 50 m in daylight

target: Glow lasts the whole event window
acceptance: Power source runs glow ≥ 2× the run + staging duration

target: Panels light one by one, not all at once
acceptance: Sequenced light-up works as scripted

target: No smoke, sound props, or thrown items
acceptance: 30-second start runs with light only; passes RB content rules

target: Quiet "WARM WHEELERS" nameplate only
acceptance: No unapproved third-party logos at scrutineering
